title: paul russells 30W PIR Motion Sensor Outdoor Security Lights, 3600 Lumens, IP65 Waterproof LED Floodlights, 6500K Bright Daylight, Mains Powered for Backyard & Garden, 1-Pack
features: Ultra-Bright Lighting: Illuminate your driveway, front door, or garden with 3600 lumens of powerful light; high colour rendering (CRI > 80), provides vivid and natural smooth colour; beam angle of 120 degree provides a wide visual. These security lights reduce power consumption by over 85%, helping you save on electricity bills.

Advanced Motion Sensing: Equipped with a highly responsive PIR motion detector (upto 120 degree) with three adjustable settings for lighting time, detection range and day/night modes. Enjoy customizable security with a motion range of up to 12 meters and lighting durations from 5 seconds to 9 minutes.

Effortless Installation: Designed for easy setup with pre-soldered wires and compact size, offering flexibility in positioning. Ideal for upgrading garden, front door, or driveway lighting. Be sure to read the instruction manual before installation.
Adjustable Angles: Customize your lighting with the adjustable bracket, ensuring the perfect angle. For optimal motion detection, mount the lights on walls or at a height of up to 2.5 meters

Weatherproof Durability: Built to withstand the elements, these floodlights are made from die-cast aluminium and white frosted glass, with an IP65 protection grade. They are rust-proof and feature electrostatic adsorption coating, ideal for outdoor use in gardens, courtyards, and more.
description: From the brand Previous page Paul Russells Lighting, established in 2014 and based in London, is a leading provider of professional, energy-efficient lighting solutions. Renowned for exceptional quality and competitive valuation, we supply innovative LED lamps and luminaires for commercial, residential, and outdoor applications. Our products are designed for sustainability, performance, and ease of installation.
